title: tengine.checkpoint.warmup_chain_timing v1
description: Per-WT first-signal timestamp from SignalTimeline, grouped by warmup chain. Emitted once per chain WT at session end by crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/session_ctrl.rs::emit(), which reads the SignalTimeline GPU ring (RES_SIGNAL_TIMELINE) after all frames have completed. total_warmup_ms = max_first_signal_ns - min_first_signal_ns across the chain's WTs. Producer: registry handle WARMUP_CHAIN_TIMING in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/track_group.rs. CloudEvents subject is the chain name (e.g. 'svdag').

first_signal_frame.description: Estimated GPU frame index at which the WT's first signal was recorded.

first_signal_ns.description: Nanosecond timestamp of the WT's first-signal entry in SignalTimeline.

total_warmup_ms.description: Chain's total warmup duration in milliseconds: (max_first_signal_ns - min_first_signal_ns) / 1e6 across all WTs in the chain.

frames_rendered.description: Informational: total frames rendered in the session at emission time. Not part of the registry's declared schema but present on the wire; consumers should treat it as optional.
